arts.ttl: [1-0] Paris SG-Toulouse: João Neves abre a contagem na partida
French soccer federation says it won't intervene in Mbappé vs. PSG dispute
arts.sum: PSG asked the federation to look into the call by the French league appeals commission last month to uphold a decision ordering the club to pay Mbappé 55 million euros ($60 million). The league legal commission ruled in favor of Mbappé but PSG insisted it did not owe him money and appealed.

PSG have been told to pay Kylian Mbappe outstanding wages and bonuses of up to €55 million by the French Football Association (FFF) as the latest round in the dispute between the two parties fell in favour of the Real Madrid player. The first problems were made clear as far back as summer 2023, when Mbappe was excluded from PSG training and even missed the first match of the 2023/24 campaign because of the issue.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Rival West Ham for PSG’s £60M-Rated Summer Target
arts.sum: As the summer transfer window closed, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, and recent reports suggest they might reignite their pursuit in January. However, they could face stiff competition for his signature. PSG’s struggles in front of goal have highlighted the need for attacking reinforcements. arts.sum: Manchester United step up their pursuit of Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani, according to a report.
